auth.appDescription: Your advanced dashboard for environmental monitoring and disaster management.
auth.emailInstruction: Enter your email and we'll send you a link.
auth.linkSent: If an account exists, we sent a link!
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

settings.title: Settings
settings.desc: Manage your preferences and application appearance.
settings.appearanceDesc: Customize the look and feel of Nautilus.

deleteAccount.title: ⚠️ Delete Account
deleteAccount.confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
deleteAccount.warningTitle: Warning: This action cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.warningText: All your data, settings, and preferences will be permanently removed from our database.

help.title: Help Center
help.a1: Nautilus is a comprehensive dashboard designed for monitoring environmental phenomena and natural disasters. It allows users to view weather patterns, track storms in real-time, and receive safety recommendations.
help.a2_prefix: For technical support or feature requests, email the support team at
help.q3: How does the radius slider work?
help.a3: The radius slider adjusts the area of interest around your location. The app calculates weather data for multiple points along this circle to give you a more accurate 'surrounding area' forecast.

about.title: About Nautilus
about.description: Nautilus is an advanced environmental monitoring dashboard. Built as part of a thesis project, it leverages geolocation and weather APIs to ensure user safety through timely predictions.
about.unauthorized: Unauthorized copying or distribution of this software is strictly prohibited.

logout.title: Confirm Logout
logout.message: Are you sure you want to log out?

forecast.title: 🗓️ 5-Day Forecast
forecast.adviceTitle: 👕 What to wear / Watch out for:
forecast.heat: 🔥 Very hot — light clothes, water, avoid sun
forecast.rain: ☔ Rain expected — take an umbrella or raincoat
forecast.cold: 🧥 Cold — take a jacket or coat
